description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is not logged in
AND the user is on the Welcome page
AND focus is not on the "Browse Subscriptions" button

steps.action: WHEN the user assigns focus to the "Browse Subscriptions" button
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Click to browse subscriptions. Press or scroll down to hear the next option or up to hear the previous one."
